title: GLAKER Hair Clippers and 6-in-1 Beard Trimmer Men, Professional Barber Clippers for Haircut Cordless Hair Trimmer Nose & Ear Trimmer,Mustache, Body Groomer, USB-C Rechargeable (Gold)
features: All-in-One Versatility: Achieve salon-quality results at home with the GLAKER Professional Grooming Kit, featuring a cordless hair clippers and 6-in-1 beard trimmer.The 6-in 1 beard trimmer men includes T-blade Trimmer(1.5/3/6/9mm guard combs) , hair trimmer (1.5/3/6/9mm guard combs) , precision trimmer, nose & ear trimmer, body groomer, mini foil shaver

Perfect for Stylish Haircuts and Beards: Designed for precision and versatility, this all-in-one kit is perfect for beginners and pros alike, perfect for beard trimming, haircuts, nose and ear detailing, and more. Meeting all your hair and beard styling needs

Powerful Motor & Ultra-Sharp Blades: Equipped with a 7200RPM high-speed motor and precision-engineered stainless steel blades, this hair clippers effortlessly cuts through thick and curly hair. Enjoy fast, smooth, and snag-free trimming every time, delivering a professional-grade cut without pulling or irritation

One-Step Fading & Precision Control: The adjustable fade lever (0.5-1.5mm) and 3/6/9/12 guard combs make fading and zero-gap detailing effortless. Achieve clean lines, perfect trims, and stylish haircuts with ease
Long-Lasting Battery & Cordless Freedom: Enjoy up to 240 minutes of runtime with USB-C fast charging. The cordless design offers unmatched convenience, allowing you to groom anytime, anywhere

Quiet Mode & Ergonomic Design: Featuring a low-noise design (below 68dB), this grooming kit is perfect for kids or sensitive users. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip and stable handling, providing a smooth and stress-free trimming experience

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always keep the product away from water. Do not use while charging. Keep out of reach of children. Always use the product with caution, especially when trimming hair near the face and ears. Always unplug the product from the power source before cleaning. Always dispose of the product in accordance with local regulations.
